prompt: Напиши локальную CLI .py утилиту без обязательных внешних зависимостей: вход - путь к файлу .source, выход - файл .target с тем же базовым именем или указанным output path. Реальная конвертация должна быть отделена adapter boundary; default tests работают без внешних библиотек и сети через deterministic fixture adapter.
expected_steps: classify prompt as bounded generic file-conversion CLI
extract source and target extensions into GenericFileConversionRecipe
create isolated reusable file_converter_cli scaffold with README and tests
define adapter boundary and dependency policy
reject missing or unsupported inputs with controlled errors
run project-scoped tests and produce release instructions
acceptance_criteria: conversion recipe captures source and target formats
library binding recipe proposes bounded adapter candidates
adapter implementation plan selects implemented stdlib backend or fallback
CLI writes target output through adapter boundary
missing or unsupported inputs are rejected with controlled errors
default tests run without real conversion dependencies or network
all tests run from generated project root
